---
title: |
  Machine Learning for Characterization and Processing<br>Unit 13: End-to-End Case Study (Data to Decision)
bibliography: ref.bib
author:
  - name: Prof. Dr. Philipp Pelz
    affiliation:
      - FAU Erlangen-Nürnberg
execute:
  eval: false
format:
  revealjs:
    width: 1920
    height: 1080
    template-partials:
      - title-slide.html
    css: custom.css
    theme: custom.scss
    slide-number: c/t
    logo: "eclipse_logo_small.png"
    footer: "© Philipp Pelz - ML for Characterization and Processing"
---

## 01. Title: End-to-End Case Study (Data to Decision)
- Unit scope and capstone role.

## 02. Learning outcomes
- Integrate full ML workflow for lab decision support.

## 03. Recap from Units 1–12
- Building blocks to close the loop.

## 04. Case-study framing
- Objective, constraints, success criteria.

## 05. Data acquisition stage
- Sensor/instrument inputs and metadata.

## 06. Data quality audit
- Noise, artifacts, completeness checks.

## 07. Preprocessing pipeline
- Standardization and reproducible transforms.

## 08. Feature extraction stage
- Segmentation/detection-derived descriptors.

## 09. Baseline model stage
- Interpretable first model.

## 10. Advanced model stage
- Deep/physics-informed enhancement.

## 11. Validation protocol
- Split strategy and leakage prevention.

## 12. Error analysis
- Failure taxonomy and root causes.

## 13. Uncertainty estimation
- Confidence-aware prediction outputs.

## 14. Calibration audit
- Reliability diagnostics.

## 15. Explainability layer
- Local/global rationale for predictions.

## 16. Decision policy design
- Thresholds, abstain, escalation.

## 17. Optimization layer
- Suggest next process/experiment action.

## 18. Safety constraints
- Hard limits and operator overrides.

## 19. Human-in-the-loop checkpoints
- Review and approval stages.

## 20. Deployment architecture
- Offline, shadow, then active mode.

## 21. Monitoring and drift detection
- Runtime health and shift alerts.

## 22. Incident response workflow
- Detect, contain, recover.

## 23. Logging and traceability
- Audit-ready decision records.

## 24. KPI dashboard
- Accuracy, latency, utility, safety.

## 25. Reproducibility packaging
- Data/model/environment snapshots.

## 26. Case branch A: microscopy defect triage
- End-to-end scaffold.

## 27. Case branch B: spectroscopy process alarm
- End-to-end scaffold.

## 28. Case branch C: adaptive experiment selection
- End-to-end scaffold.

## 29. Comparative analysis across branches
- Transferable lessons.

## 30. Failure mode #1
- Overconfident automation.

## 31. Failure mode #2
- Drift-driven policy degradation.

## 32. Failure mode #3
- Decision bottlenecks from poor UX.

## 33. Mitigation checklist
- Robust data-to-decision guardrails.

## 34. Governance and accountability
- Ownership and sign-off model.

## 35. Ethical and operational considerations
- Responsible lab AI usage.

## 36. Communicating results to stakeholders
- Technical + domain narratives.

## 37. Capstone template
- Reusable project blueprint.

## 38. Exercise scaffold: define your case
- Problem statement and constraints.

## 39. Exercise scaffold: build pipeline map
- Stages and interfaces.

## 40. Exercise scaffold: run baseline + advanced model
- Compare decision quality.

## 41. Exercise scaffold: uncertainty-calibrated policy
- Design action logic.

## 42. Exercise scaffold: deployment simulation
- Shadow-mode test.

## 43. Exercise scaffold: post-mortem
- Analyze one failure scenario.

## 44. Exam-oriented key statements
- High-yield integrative concepts.

## 45. Summary table
- End-to-end stages and risks.

## 46. Unit summary
- Core takeaways.

## 47. References
- Source list.

## 48. Final course synthesis
- What students can now do.

## 49. Outlook slide
- Future research/practice directions.

## 50. Closing / Q&A
- Discussion and wrap-up.

::: {#refs}
:::
